name: on linSpikeEvent
title: on linSpikeEvent
description: The event procedure on linSpikeEvent is called when the LIN hardware detects a spike on the bus (i.e. a short dominant signal that is too short to be a valid wake-up frame or to be accepted as a start bit and be reported by the UART).
The keyword this and the selectors can be used to access the data of the event that has just been received.
